title: Amphenol: Enabling The Electronics Revolution
text: Amphenol is a leading designer and manufacturer of connectors, interconnects, sensors and cables amongst others. It benefits from the trend of electrification in most industries.

title: 'Boring' Amphenol Is a Strong Performer
text: In the investing business, boring is often good. It means investors do not have to look over their shoulders or stay awake at night.
